name: Cinnamon Rolls (Bechtel)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup POTATOES, mashed (unseasoned and without milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the warm water, granulated sugar, vegetable oil, mashed potatoes, egg, and salt.
2. Add the active dry yeast and mix thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the milk powder and all-purpose flour; beat for 3 minutes.
4. Mix in the bread flour, continuing until the dough is workable.
5. Transfer the dough to a lightly floured surface (or use the dough hook attachment on your electric mixer) and knead for 10 minutes.
